positive: A minimalist and stylish depiction of a stylized mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. The mountain peaks should be sharp and geometrically abstract, resembling a clean, single-line continuous drawing style. The colors should be highly saturated and flat, emphasizing deep indigo, burnt orange, and magenta. The composition must be centered and scalable for apparel, featuring strong, negative space. Include subtle geometric fauna like abstracted celestial moons or abstract mountain goats climbing the slopes. The overall aesthetic is modern graphic design, perfect for screen printing, vector art quality, high contrast, clean silhouettes, UHD.
